hotel_name: Khách sạn River 4 Long Xuyên (River Hotel 4 Long Xuyên)

reviews.title: NEVER COME BACK
reviews.text: Check-in 30 minutes earlier. The hotel did not inform the guests about the additional charge from the beginning; after check-out, there was an extra charge of 20,000 VND for checking in less than 1 hour early. The room did not match the pictures, and cleanliness was not thorough.

reviews.title: Nous avons changé d’hôtel
reviews.positives: Rien, . Cet hôtel peut être réservé à l’heure, faite vos conclusions., et les draps étaient sales cela en dit long. Ne vous fiez-vous pas aux photos

reviews.title: I was charged an additional fee.
reviews.text: I arrived early and was shown straight to my room, but at checkout, I was charged for early check-in. I was surprised because there was no explanation given at the beginning, and this was my first experience with such a thing. It's relatively clean, but it seems to double as a love hotel, as it is equipped with contraceptives and gowns.
reviews.response: I apologize to you because the receptionist may have been negligent in forgetting to inform you in advance about the early check-in surcharge. I will remind the receptionist to learn from experience. I hope you understand and thank you.

reviews.title: Hôtel très moyen
reviews.positives: Chambre spacieuse
reviews.negatives:
Chambre prête à partir de 16h
Sol de la salle de bain trempé lors de mon arrivée dans la chambre 
Mauvaise odeur dans la chambre 
Propreté à revoir : coton tiges sales dans un tiroir, soucoupes des tasses pleines de café (et les tasses inexistantes)
Bouteilles d’eau payantes et on nous le fait savoir au moment du check out (10.000 pour une bouteille qui vaut 5.000 au supermarché)
Mauvais wifi
Lit pas confortable 
Robinet de la douche cassé 
Mauvaise insonorisation (impossible de fermer complètement les fenêtres donnant sur l’extérieur)
Personnel ne parle pas anglais

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text: Everything was dirty, the mat was full of hair, same with the restroom, and stinks too. They did not even have a sleeping light nor dimmable lights. And the bed was rock-hard with a smelly blanket.

reviews.title: Propre et bien situé
reviews.positives:
Chambre avec tout le confort nécessaire (Clim, wifi, propre, neuf) mais pas d’eau chaude. 
Proche à pied du marché et du fleuve, pleins de restaurants et commerces à côté. 
Ils nous ont réservé le bus gratuitement. Je recommande.
reviews.negatives: Coupure de courant exceptionnelle dans le quartier l’après midi (de 14h30 à 18h) mais nous n’avons pas eut de compensation pour ça.

reviews.title: The room service is poor.
reviews.text:
No elevator  
Guests arriving without a ready room must wait for cleaning  
The room is dirty  
The air conditioning and bedding have electric shocks when cold  
Chairs in the room are broken and cracked  
Not worth the price  
Parking space is cramped, not enough room  
Not coming back

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Bon rapport qualité prix. Pratique pour accéder à pied au marché flottant (15min)
reviews.negatives: Mauvaise odeur dans la salle de bain

reviews.title: It says that the reservation cannot be confirmed.
reviews.text: I was told that I forgot to confirm the reservation and to go to a much cheaper motel... I contacted them in advance and informed them of my arrival time, but it took 30 minutes to confirm that. Just go somewhere else.

reviews.title: Super séjour
reviews.positives: L’accueil, chambre spacieuse et confortable, rapport qualité prix imbattable

reviews.title: Being charged unreasonable fees.
reviews.text:
I don’t know if it’s the staff or the employee, but at 11 PM, they are singing loudly, especially poorly.
- When checking in, they said the room I booked on the app was full, only the balcony room was available with an additional fee of 30k, which I agreed to. When I asked about the checkout time, they said it was from 6 PM to 7 PM.
- I had already paid on Agoda, but when checking out, they asked for an additional total of 60k.
- The problem is that right from the beginning, they didn’t inform me that it was 60k but rather 30k. I sent a message to clarify, but I didn’t receive a response. I’m really disappointed!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Wir haben zwei Zimmer gebucht. Vor Ort teilt man uns mit, dass nur ein Zimmer verfügbar ist. Die Angestellte bot uns an uns auf ein anderes Hotel der River Kette umzubuchen, war aber ansonsten wenig serviceorientiert und wenig verständnisvoll. 

Bei der Recherche auf booking.com nach einer Alternative waren auch weiterhin Zimmer des Hotels zu buchen. 
Das Geschäftsmodell und die Servicequalität des Personals sind entsprechend mangelhaft. Die Zimmer kann ich nicht bewerten, da wir letztlich woanders übernachtet haben.

reviews.title: Booked a room but the hotel arbitrarily changed to another hotel.
reviews.text: KS is disappointing. Unilaterally switched to KS2. So bored that I'm just quitting.

reviews.title: Tôi đặt trên booking ks đã xác nhận, tới báo hết phòng, trong khi trời đang mưa
reviews.positives: Tệ
reviews.negatives: K thích tất cả

reviews.title: The accommodation is not worth the price.
reviews.text: Initially, I saw that the picture showed a large room with a kitchen, but when I arrived, the staff said that room was fully booked even though I had reserved it a day in advance. The solution they offered was to give me a much smaller room than the one I had booked, and the staff's attitude was extremely unhelpful.

reviews.title: Toi buoc phai chuyen di noi khac - huy phong
reviews.positives: Khong dap ung viec booking cua toi
reviews.negatives: Su that tha cua khach san can phai cai thien va ro rang

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I wish the shower was hotter. It's fine in summer, but it's better to avoid it in winter.

reviews.title: Kinh khủng !
reviews.negatives: Địa điểm không an toàn, khách ở bị mất trộm sạch sẻ. Khách sạn vô trách nhiệm

reviews.title: Accommodations during a business trip
reviews.text: The cost performance is good. However, communication in other languages is difficult. You need to use an app.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Xe hư dọc đường nên 2h sáng bạn mình mới đến được khách sạn. Nhân viên đang ngủ nên rất bực bội đuổi bạn mình đi. Trời tối xe hư nên phải mướn taxi đi vòng vòng tìm phòng. Biết là đến giờ đó mới nhận phòng và  ko gọi báo trước là lỗi bên mình nhưng khách sạn cũng nên thông cảm cho khách. Bạn mình ở SG chạy xe mấy tiếng xuống, chưa tính phải đẩy xe tìm chỗ sữa, nghĩ nhận phòng rồi mai đi làm sớm. Cuối cùng lại chạy vòng vòng tìm phòng nên buồn. Mình hi vọng khách sạn sau này có thể linh động hơn.

reviews.title: A room with a balcony is recommended!
reviews.text: This is a business hotel as well as a love hotel. If you understand this, the rooms are spacious, clean, and comfortable. Water and coffee sticks are charged separately. The staff are friendly and can also make bus reservations for you. If you don't have a room with a balcony, there are hardly any windows, and staying for multiple nights might be tough.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Gần trung tâm
reviews.negatives: Tiện nghi và cách phục vụ kèm theo dịch vụ không đáng gọi là hotel chỉ tạm chấp nhận hạn mục nhà nghỉ mà thôi

reviews.title: Great quality for price
reviews.text: It was very cheap and good value.

reviews.title: Trung bình thấp
reviews.positives: Vị trí trung tâm
reviews.negatives:
Giá không rẻ
Chỗ để xe chật
Phải đi thang bộ
Nước nóng không có
Phòng hôi

reviews.title: Convenient and helpful
reviews.text:
Helpful and friendly. Lent bike for Emergency Pick up medicine.  Should replace two broken chairs immediately everything sounded ok. Also, there should provide a receipt for paying to stay at hotel basically. Email it rather than not giving One even per requested. 
Cheers 
See you next holiday

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Tự do thoải mái đi lại. Nhân viên nhiệt tình.
reviews.negatives:
Giá thuê xe cao. 200k/ngày
Vòi nóng lạnh hoạt động ko tốt.

reviews.title: Better than expected
reviews.text:
The price was very affordable considering that Long Xuyen is not a big town. Yet even at that price, the room was very good. Private bathroom with hot water, toilet with water hose, air-conditioned, TV with internet, Wi-Fi, spacious room and helpful staff.
The hotel is located in the old part of the town which is in the centre of the town.

reviews.title: Hợp ví
reviews.positives: Gần trung tâm
reviews.negatives: Đây là chỗ nghỉ theo giờ

reviews.title: Chambre non conforme
reviews.text: Je n'ai pas pu obtenir la vue merci que j'avais réservé

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.positives: Phòng rất đẹp, thoải mái
reviews.negatives: Ban công không có gì để chú ý

reviews.title: Cảm nhận chuyến đi
reviews.positives: Dịch vụ tốt, tiện nghi, sạch sẽ, nhân viên thân thiện và chu đáo.
reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: Bel emplacement
reviews.text:
Nous n'avons passé qu'une nuit là-bas, mais ce fut exceptionnel.
En arrivant, nous avions plein de questions pour visiter le floating market et prendre le bus jusqu'à Chau Doc le lendemain. Malgré que la fille à la réception ne parlait pas anglais, grâce à googletranslate, elle nous a organisé un taxi jusqu'au port et un petit bateau pour le marché flottant. Elle nous a aussi réservé les billets de bus pour Chau Doc, en prévoyant un taxi jusqu'à la station.
Au niveau de l'hôtel, c'est propre et les lits sont confortables.
Et nous avons vécu une histoire bouleversante, qui nous laissera un souvenir impérissable de notre passage à Long Xuyen et que je souhaite partager ici.
Dans la rues, nous avons vu quelques enfants qui nous semblaient orphelins et livrés à eux-mêmes.
En discutant avec la fille de l'hôtel, elle nous a dit que c'était un problème et qu'il y avait un centre qui s'occupait de ces enfants. Elle nous a donc organisé une visite du centre. Nous lui avons donné de l'argent pour qu'elle achète quelque chose pour ces enfants.
Avant de prendre le bus le lendemain, nous avons donc été, avec elle et son frère, faire les courses, des tonnes de courses, nous sommes ensuite allés dans une salle de billard pour faire des paquets et mettre de l'argent dans des enveloppes. Nous ne comprenions pas toujours où nous allions et ce que nous faisions, mais nous lui faisions confiance et parce que c'était pour les enfants.
Arrivés au centre, nous avons d'abord été donné personnellement les enveloppes à chacune des personnes âgées qui vivaient là (aussi abandonnées par leur famille, le centre s'occupe aussi d'eux).
Ensuite ce fut au tour des enfants, qui était très excités de notre venue. Nous leur avons distribué les paquets et ils furent très reconnaissants.
Il est difficile d'aider depuis chez nous, surtout que nous ne savons souvent pas à qui va notre argent. Là nous avons donné un peu de bonheur à des personnes dans le besoin.
Nous restons en contact avec la patronne de ce petit hôtel afin d'essayer d'aider plus depuis chez nous.
Dans tous les cas, c'est une bonne personne qui tient cet hôtel et vous pouvez totalement lui faire confiance.

reviews.title: Kỳ nghỉ của tôi tại River Hotel 4 Long Xuyên là một trải nghiệm rất tốt.
reviews.positives: Phòng nghỉ rộng rãi, sạch sẽ, thiết kế hiện đại và đầy đủ tiện nghi, mang lại cảm giác thoải mái như đang ở nhà. Đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình. Bữa sáng phong phú, món ăn ngon và hợp khẩu vị. Từ khách sạn rất thuận tiện để đi đến trung tâm và chợ. View đẹp và yên bình rất thích hợp để thư giãn sau những ngày làm việc bận rộn.

reviews.title: Quá ổn trong tầm giá
reviews.positives: Không gian phòng thoáng đãng, sạch sẽ, được chăm chút cẩn thận và đầy đủ tiện nghi. Đội ngũ nhân viên dễ mến, nhiệt tình, tạo cảm giác thoải mái ngay từ đầu. Quy trình phục vụ nhanh nhẹn, chuyên nghiệp. Vị trí đẹp, thuận tiện di chuyển, tầm nhìn ấn tượng – một trải nghiệm hoàn toàn xứng đáng! ✨

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Phòng E8 sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện nghi & rộng rãi,  rất đáng để ở.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.negatives: Giường không thay ga, vẫn còn tóc khách khác nhưng với giá tiền này thì không đòi hỏi gì thêm😁

reviews.title: Một kỳ nghỉ ngắn nhưng trọn vẹn, thoải mái và đủ để nạp lại năng lượng.
reviews.positives: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, phòng gọn gàng và đúng như mô tả. Nhân viên thân thiện, hỗ trợ nhanh khi cần. Vị trí thuận tiện, phù hợp cho cả nghỉ ngơi lẫn di chuyển.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: không có

reviews.title: Apartmán hezký,  ale některé vybavení poškozené. Na přespání ucházející, vzhledem k ceně.
reviews.positives: Dobrá lokalita, možnost zapůjčení skůtru.
reviews.negatives: S personálem se nedalo domluvit anglicky, rozbitá toaleta, židle a stěna v koupelně.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Pěší dostupnost centra, k trhu i přístavu. Když pro nás nepřijel odvoz na autobus, pomohli nám vše vykomunikovat.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.negatives: I booked a room through booking already, but when I arrived, the staff said there was no room, the reception desk only had 1 small bench, the staff did not invite guests to sit. While I was arguing with the staff, another guest arrived. , he booked a room through Agoda and was also informed by the staff that the room was full. This hotel is not honest with customers and partners

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Our rooms were not ready when we arrived.
The place is more a motel not a hotel. Had I known it also rents by the hour I wouldn’t have booked for my family to stay.
There was no lift access only stairs and the rooms
Patrons parked there motorbikes inside the property which the bedrooms were

reviews.title: Normal

reviews.negatives: No room at 5 o'clock in evening, although hotel note check in 2 o'clock in evening.so bad, unfriendly,

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very well located, helpful staff, the room was big and comfortable
reviews.negatives:
We left our bags in the room in the morning and told the employee we would leave at 12h50. We were not warned that check out was at 12 and we were charged for an extra hour. It's no big deal but it would have been considerate to warn us

Also bathroom was not very clean

reviews.title: Great staff, good rooms.
